summary: Lead records a post-acceptance CI formatting repair for M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001. PR #112 initially failed the Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke job at pnpm check because Prettier reported packages/save-format/src/index.ts and packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts. Lead applied Prettier only to those two previously reviewed task-scope files, reran local checks and affected tests, and preserved deterministic M5 hash bf042e42. No behavior, API, scope, Human Gate, dependency, UI/client/desktop, telemetry, server/multiplayer, or manual node battle change is introduced by this repair.

tests_run.result: Formatted only the two CI-reported task-scope files.
format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed locally.
No whitespace errors after formatting repair.
VALID task file after formatting repair.
M5 Node hash bf042e42, worker-compatible hash bf042e42, loaded hash bf042e42; deterministic M5 playable loop matched.

decisions: Keep systems_architect and qa_reviewer ACCEPT decisions valid because the repair is Prettier-only over already reviewed task-scope files and local behavior checks passed.
Do not mark CLOSED until PR #112 reruns CI, merges, and main synchronization is confirmed.
Preserve downstream Human Gates and M5 scope limits.
risks: P3: Large Prettier reflow in packages/save-format/src/index.ts makes textual review noisier, but local check/test/determinism evidence confirms no behavior drift.
requested_action: Commit this CI-fix evidence, push branch, wait for PR #112 CI rerun, merge on pass, then close M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 and continue to the next READY M5 task.
